---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    paper: a4
    margin:
      top: 1.5cm
      bottom: 1.5cm
      left: 1.8cm
      right: 1.8cm
---

```{=typst}

// ── Colours ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#let navy      = rgb("#1a1a2e")
#let blue      = rgb("#4a90d9")
#let lightblue = rgb("#daeaf7")
#let amber     = rgb("#C97B2A")
#let gray-bg   = rgb("#f5f5f5")
#let mid-gray  = rgb("#888888")
#let border    = rgb("#cccccc")

// ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// A labelled field: label on top, underline below for writing
#let field(label, width: 1fr, height: 0.7cm) = {
  box(width: width)[
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray, weight: "regular")[#label]
    #v(1pt)
    #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)
    #v(height)
  ]
}

// A section header bar
#let section(title) = {
  v(6pt)
  block(
    width: 100%,
    fill: white,
    stroke: 1pt + navy,
    inset: (x: 8pt, y: 5pt),
    radius: 3pt,
  )[
    #text(size: 8.5pt, fill: navy, weight: "bold", tracking: 1pt)[
      #upper(title)
    ]
  ]
  v(4pt)
}

// Checkbox helper
#let checkbox(label) = {
  box(width: 10pt, height: 10pt, stroke: 0.5pt + border, radius: 1pt)
  h(4pt)
  text(size: 8.5pt)[#label]
  h(12pt)
}

// ── HEADER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#block(
  width: 100%,
  fill: white,
  stroke: 1pt + navy,
  inset: (x: 12pt, y: 10pt),
  radius: 4pt,
)[
  #grid(
    columns: (2cm, 1fr, 2.5cm),
    column-gutter: 10pt,
    align: horizon,

    // SARA logo placeholder
    block(
      width: 2cm,
      height: 2cm,
      fill: white,
      radius: 4pt,
      inset: 4pt,
    )[
      #align(center + horizon)[
        //#text(size: 7pt, fill: navy, weight: "bold")[SARA\ LOGO]
        #box(image("logo-sara.png", width:100%))
      ]
    ],

    // Title block
    align(center)[
      #text(size: 15pt, fill: navy, weight: "bold")[
        SARA Institute of Data Science
      ]
      #v(2pt)
      #text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#677887"))[
        SARA EDUCATION TRUST (REGD.)
      ]
      #v(3pt)
      #block(
        fill: white,
        stroke: 0.5pt + navy,
        inset: (x: 10pt, y: 4pt),
        radius: 3pt,
      )[
        #text(size: 9pt, fill: navy, weight: "bold")[
          3rd SARA Summer School: R for Researchers, 22–26 July 2026, Sonipat
        ]
        #h(6pt)
        //#text(size: 8.5pt, fill: rgb("#7c8084"))[
          //22–26 July 2026  •  Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan, Sonipat
        //]
      ]
      #v(2pt)
      #text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#677887"))[
        PARTICIPANT REGISTRATION FORM
      ]
    ],

    // Photo box
    block(
      width: 2.5cm,
      height: 3cm,
      stroke: 0.5pt + border,
      radius: 3pt,
      fill: rgb("#e8e8e8"),
    )[
      #align(center + horizon)[
        #text(size: 7pt, fill: mid-gray, style: "italic")[
          Paste\ Passport\ Size\ Photo
        ]
      ]
    ],
  )
]

#v(6pt)

// ── SECTION 1: PERSONAL DETAILS ───────────────────────────────────────────────
#section("1. Personal Details")

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 10pt,
  row-gutter: 8pt,

  field("Full Name", width: 100%),
  field("Date of Birth (DD/MM/YYYY)", width: 100%),
  field("Gender", width: 100%),

  field("Father's Name", width: 100%),
  field("Mother's Name", width: 100%),
  field("Caste Category (SC/ST/OBC/General)", width: 100%),
)

#v(2pt)

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 10pt,

  field("Mobile Number", width: 100%),
  field("WhatsApp Number (if different)", width: 100%),
  field("Email Address", width: 100%),
)

// ── SECTION 2: ADDRESS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#section("2. Correspondence Address")

#grid(
  columns: (2fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 10pt,
  row-gutter: 8pt,

  field("Street Address / Village / Locality", width: 100%),
  field("City / Town", width: 100%),
  field("District", width: 100%),

  field("State", width: 100%),
  field("PIN Code", width: 100%),
  field("Country", width: 100%),
)

// ── SECTION 3: ACADEMIC & PROFESSIONAL DETAILS ────────────────────────────────
#section("3. Academic & Professional Details")

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 10pt,
  row-gutter: 8pt,

  field("Highest Qualification", width: 100%),
  field("Subject / Discipline", width: 100%),
  field("Institution / University", width: 100%),

  field("Current Status", width: 100%),
  field("Designation (if employed)", width: 100%),
  field("Organisation / College (if applicable)", width: 100%),
)

#v(4pt)
#text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Current Status:]
#h(6pt)
#checkbox("Student")
#checkbox("Research Scholar")
#checkbox("Faculty")
#checkbox("Working Professional")
#checkbox("Other")

// ── SECTION 4: R & STATISTICAL BACKGROUND ────────────────────────────────────
// #section("4. Background in R & Statistics")

// #v(2pt)
// #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[R Programming experience:]
// #h(6pt)
// #checkbox("No experience")
// #checkbox("Beginner")
// #checkbox("Intermediate")
// #checkbox("Advanced")

// #v(5pt)
// #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Statistics background:]
// #h(6pt)
// #checkbox("None")
// #checkbox("Basic")
// #checkbox("Intermediate")
// #checkbox("Advanced")

// #v(5pt)
// #field("What do you hope to learn from this Summer School?", width: 100%, height: 1cm)

// ── SECTION 5: ACCOMMODATION & FOOD ──────────────────────────────────────────
// #section("5. Accommodation & Food")

// #v(2pt)
// #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Do you require accommodation?]
// #h(6pt)
// #checkbox("Yes")
// #checkbox("No")
// #h(20pt)
// #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Food preference:]
// #h(6pt)
// #checkbox("Vegetarian")
// #checkbox("Vegan")
// #checkbox("No preference")

// #v(5pt)
// #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Any dietary restrictions / allergies / medical needs:]
// #v(1pt)
// #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)
// #v(0.4cm)

// ── SECTION 6: FELLOWSHIP / FEE ───────────────────────────────────────────────
#section("4. Five Days Food & Accommodation Charges")

#v(2pt)
#text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[]
#h(6pt)
#checkbox("Fully-funded")
#checkbox("Early Bird Rs.2700")
#checkbox("Regular Price Rs.4500")


// ── SECTION 7: EMERGENCY CONTACT ─────────────────────────────────────────────
#v(5pt)
#section("5. Emergency Contact")

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 10pt,

  field("Name", width: 100%),
  field("Relationship", width: 100%),
  field("Mobile Number", width: 100%),
)

// ── DECLARATION & SIGNATURE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
#v(5pt)
#block(
  width: 100%,
  fill: white,
  //stroke: 0.5pt + navy,
  inset: (x: 10pt, y: 7pt),
  radius: 3pt,
  stroke: 0.4pt + blue,
)[
  #text(size: 7.5pt, style: "italic", fill: rgb("#333333"))[
    I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge. 
    I agree to abide by the rules and guidelines of the SARA Summer School and to engage with fellow 
    participants with respect, kindness, and integrity.
  ]
]

#v(5pt)
#grid(
  columns: (1.5fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 16pt,

  [
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Participant's Signature]
    #v(1pt)
    #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)
    #v(0.8cm)
  ],
  [
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Date (DD/MM/YYYY)]
    #v(1pt)
    #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)
    #v(0.8cm)
  ],
  [
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: mid-gray)[Place]
    #v(1pt)
    #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + border)
    #v(0.8cm)
  ],
)

// ── FOOTER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#v(2pt)
#block(
  width: 100%,
  fill: white,
  stroke: 0.5pt + navy,
  inset: (x: 10pt, y: 5pt),
  radius: 3pt,
)[
  #align(center)[
    #text(size: 7pt, fill: rgb("#6d7378"))[
      SARA Institute of Data Science  •  Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan, Kakroi Road, Sonipat  
      •  sara-edu.netlify.app
    ]
  ]
]
```
